case_title: YELIZAVETA SOSNOVSKAYA VS. ADRIENNE MOORE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOSNOVSKAYA, YELIZAVETA AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, ADRIENNE DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-05-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-21-2012
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, ADRIENNE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOSNOVSKAYA, YELIZAVETA SERVED JUN-11-2012, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE JUN-24-2012 AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, ADRIENNE
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-05-2012. SEP-05-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOSNOVSKAYA, YELIZAVETA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 9.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-15-2012.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR KENNETH GEORGE JOHNSON.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN SCOTT BURESH.
ARBITRATOR RICHARD STEPHEN DIESTEL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-16-2012 THROUGH FEB-14-2013.
STIPULATION TO ADR - PRIVATE MEDIATION; FILED BY SOSNOVSKAYA, YELIZAVETA
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-08-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE IS REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY DAVIS, BRIAN R
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOSNOVSKAYA, YELIZAVETA
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-08-2013. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED ON 5/2/13. CASES IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON SEP-24-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-24-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
